title: A song of ascents. Of David.

verses.1: Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers live together in harmony!
verses.2: It is like fine oil on the head, running down on the beard, running down Aaron’s beard over the collar of his robes.
verses.3: It is like the dew of Hermon falling on the mountains of Zion. For there the LORD has bestowed the blessing of life forevermore.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
